responses: Hello! How can I help you today?
Hi there! What can I do for you?
Welcome to the Efrei Student Portal! How can I assist you?
See you soon! Don't hesitate if you have any more questions.
You're welcome! It's a pleasure to help you.
This website was created by Audrey Mallet and Nour Gmati for a Web Programming project in P2-int4 !
Efrei is an engineering school located in Paris. You can learn more by clicking on 'About Efrei' in our navigation menu!
We are proud Efrei students! Check out the 'About Efrei' page for more details about our campus and programs.
You can find all upcoming exams, deadlines, and events in the Calendar section. Scroll up to the calendar to see what's coming up!
All important dates like the Web Programming Project deadline are listed in the interactive Calendar on this page.
On this website, you can view an interactive image gallery, check your upcoming student calendar, and chat with me!
I'm sorry, I'm not sure I understand. Could you please rephrase your question?
Sorry, I don't quite understand that. Try asking about Efrei, the calendar, or who created me!
